Task.title: Full UI Interaction Validation + Bug Reporting + Self Code Review
Task.objective: Perform a complete validation of all UI interactive elements (buttons, inputs, forms, and controls), identify functional issues, produce a structured bug report, and conduct a self-review of the entire source code to detect potential causes of UI issues, inconsistencies, or anti-patterns.

scope.includes: All UI pages and components Buttons, inputs, forms, selects, checkboxes, radio buttons Conditional rendering based on role/auth/state API-driven UI behaviors Frontend state management logic Relevant UI-related backend contract usage (read-only validation)
scope.excludes: Introducing new features outside of bug fixes Major refactoring unrelated to identified issues Changing backend logic unless required to fix a confirmed UI issue

phase.name: UI Interaction Testing
phase.steps: Iterate through all pages and components Interact with every button (click, double click, rapid click) Validate all input fields (typing, focus, validation, edge cases) Test all forms (submit, validation, error handling) Verify conditional UI rendering (role, auth, permissions) Validate loading, success, and error states
phase.coverage_expectation: No interactive element is left untested All user flows are exercised end-to-end

phase.name: Bug Detection
phase.steps: Identify non-functional buttons Identify disabled elements that should be enabled Identify inputs that cannot be edited or lose state Detect incorrect validation behavior Detect UI state mismatch with backend responses Detect performance or UX issues (lag, double triggers)

phase.name: Bug Reporting
phase.output_format: Each bug must include: Title Description Steps to reproduce Expected result Actual result Severity (Critical / High / Medium / Low) Affected component/page Screenshots or logs (if available)
phase.report_structure: Group bugs by category: Buttons Inputs Forms Conditional UI API-driven UI

phase.name: Self Code Review
phase.areas_to_review: Event handlers (onClick, onChange, submit handlers) State management (React/Vue state, hooks, stores) Controlled vs uncontrolled inputs Conditional rendering logic Permission/role checks API integration layers Error handling and loading states Reusable components and prop handling
phase.checks: No dead or unused handlers No incorrect dependency in hooks/effects No state mutation issues No inconsistent UI state logic No missing null/undefined guards No mismatch between frontend assumptions and backend contract No duplicated logic causing inconsistency
phase.output: Identify problematic patterns Highlight risky code sections Suggest minimal fixes for each issue

Task.validation_criteria: All UI interactions behave as expected All detected bugs are documented with reproducible steps Source code review identifies root causes of issues No critical UI-breaking issues remain unresolved
Task.deliverables: Bug report document (structured and categorized) Self-review report of frontend source code Summary of overall UI health status List of critical issues requiring fixes
Task.notes: Prioritize reproducibility and clarity in bug reporting. Ensure findings are based on actual observed behavior, not assumptions. Keep bug reports actionable for developers.
